mapper.select: SELECT tg.table_grp_id, tg.store_id, tg.table_grp_name, tg.table_grp_position, t.table_id, o.order_id, t.table_number, t.table_name, t.table_position, t.capacity, t.status, COALESCE(SUM(oi.unit_price), 0) AS total_price FROM table_grp tg LEFT JOIN ( tables t INNER JOIN orders o ON t.table_id = o.table_id AND t.store_id = o.store_id AND DATE(o.order_time) = CURDATE() AND o.order_status IN ('0', '1') ) ON tg.table_grp_id = t.table_grp_id AND tg.store_id = t.store_id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE tg.store_id = #{storeId} GROUP BY tg.table_grp_id, tg.store_id, tg.table_grp_name, tg.table_grp_position, t.table_id, o.order_id, t.table_number, t.table_name, t.table_position, t.capacity, t.status ORDER BY tg.table_grp_position ASC, t.table_position ASC
